planet.name: Neh
planet.description: A world connected by a biological internet formed by the sentient Maya trees. Neh is home to six sapient species who coexist in a complex web of politics, technology, and ancient rivalries spanning 6.9 billion years of history.
planet.feature: Biological internet via sentient Maya trees

species.name: Manushyas
species.description: Industrialists who power cities with unwinding springs and towers. The Manushyas are the builders and engineers of Neh, driving its industrial expansion through mechanical ingenuity.

species.name: Rakshasis
species.description: Practitioners of advanced biotechnology with malleable, shape-shifting bodies. The Rakshasis are resistant to territorial expansion, preferring biological mastery over conquest.

species.name: Vaanars
species.description: Militaristic city patrollers who maintain the high grid-networks of Neh. The Vaanars are the enforcers and guardians of urban infrastructure.

species.name: Naags
species.description: Operators on the legal fringes of Neh's society. The Naags are historic rivals of the Garudas, living in the shadows between law and lawlessness.

species.name: Garudas
species.description: Wealthy religious leaders who wield spiritual and economic power across Neh. The current scion of the Garuda lineage is Tarkash.

species.name: Dangsa
species.description: A mysterious fringe species on Neh, whose true nature and role in the planetary ecosystem remain largely unknown to the other sapient races.

characters.name: Yachay
characters.description: A unique individual who is invisible to the Maya tree network — the biological internet of Neh. This anomaly makes Yachay an outsider to the planet's collective consciousness, granting both isolation and freedom.
characters.anomaly: Cannot be detected by the Maya tree network

characters.name: Daddu
characters.description: Yachay's grandfather, a figure of wisdom and connection to the old ways of Neh. Daddu serves as a bridge between generations and keeper of ancestral knowledge.

characters.name: Kshar
characters.description: A Naag assassin operating in the dangerous intersection between species politics and personal vendettas on Neh.

characters.name: Tarkash
characters.description: The current scion of the Garuda lineage, inheriting both immense wealth and the burden of religious leadership over Neh's faithful.

concepts.name: The Divya Trials
concepts.description: A legendary series of trials through which beings of Neh may ascend to godhood or achieve amortality — transcendence beyond death itself. All six sapient species may participate, but few survive.

concepts.name: The Maya Tree Network
concepts.description: A biological internet formed by sentient Maya trees that connects all life on Neh. Every sapient being is visible to this network — with the singular exception of Yachay.

concepts.name: Planet Neh
concepts.description: The cradle of six sapient species, connected through the Maya tree biological internet across 6.9 billion years of recorded history. Neh operates in the era known as the Rule of the Mind.
